title: A Sudden Rise In Google Trends Search Volume For Data Breach Predicts Cybersecurity Sector Outperformance
thesis: Increased public concern about data breaches drives demand for cybersecurity solutions. Heightened awareness of cyber risks boosts spending in tech security companies.
signal_logic: Enter when daily Google Trends index for 'data breach' rises >20% compared to the previous 7-day average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter when daily Google Trends index for 'data breach' rises >20% compared to the previous 7-day average Exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if the search volume falls below the 7-day average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends API via api (daily).

schema.idea: A sudden rise in Google Trends search volume for 'data breach' predicts cybersecurity sector outperformance.
schema.behavior: Increased public concern about data breaches drives demand for cybersecurity solutions.

market_impact.rationale: Heightened awareness of cyber risks boosts spending in tech security companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter when daily Google Trends index for 'data breach' rises >20% compared to the previous 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if the search volume falls below the 7-day average
